TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pongodan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 397 buwan, 1,040 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 600 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 440 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 47%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pongodan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pongodan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pongodan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pongodan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pongodan hya' ga Fukid. tay 'llaw na Pongodan hya' ga Kakawasan. tay 'zil na Pongodan hya' ga Puyuma. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pongodan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pongodan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ poŋo*an ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa *uki*. taj ʔllaw na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa kakawas~ɕan. taj ʔzil na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa pujuma. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ poŋo*an ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ poŋo*an ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pongodan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 397 buwan, 1,040 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 600 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 440 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 47%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pongodan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pongodan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pongodan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pongodan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pongodan hya' ga Fukid. tay 'llaw na Pongodan hya' ga Kakawasan. tay 'zil na Pongodan hya' ga Puyuma. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Pongodan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Pongodan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ poŋo*an ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa *uki*. taj ʔllaw na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa kakawas~ɕan. taj ʔzil na poŋo*an ħjaʔ ɣa pujuma. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ poŋo*an ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ poŋo*an ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
